reviews.comment:
Cuando hay tormenta no hay señal de nada allí, ni wifi, ni débito. Sumado la mala actitud de los que atienden. No deberian existir lugares así.

(Translated by Google)
When there's a storm, there's no signal of any kind there, no Wi-Fi, no debit card. Add to that the bad attitude of the staff. Places like this shouldn't exist.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURROXJmT3hRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Destino obligado para los visitantes con destino a Misiones y de vuelta a Corrientes, para agua para el mate y comer algo para continuar viaje. Muy amables y cordiales

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop for visitors traveling to Misiones and back to Corrientes, for water for mate and something to eat before continuing their journey. Very friendly and welcoming.
